TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kodic ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 77 buwan, 208 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 173 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 35 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Kebalan 46%, Amis 31%, Tayan 1%, Paywan 1%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kodic hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kodic hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kodic hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kodic hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kodic hya' ga Fakong. tay 'zil na Kodic hya' ga Haciliwan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kodic ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kodic ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ko*iʦ~ʨ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, keβalan **%, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa *akoŋ. taj ʔzil na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa ħaʦ~ʨiliwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ko*iʦ~ʨ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ko*iʦ~ʨ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kodic ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 77 buwan, 208 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 173 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 35 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Kebalan 46%, Amis 31%, Tayan 1%, Paywan 1%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kodic hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kodic hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kodic hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kodic hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kodic hya' ga Fakong. tay 'zil na Kodic hya' ga Haciliwan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kodic ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kodic ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ko*iʦ~ʨ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, keβalan **%, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa *akoŋ. taj ʔzil na ko*iʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa ħaʦ~ʨiliwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ko*iʦ~ʨ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ko*iʦ~ʨ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
